message:
chore: update Cargo.lock for workspace dependency bumps

Lockfile refresh reflecting upstream version bumps across the workspace:

- asupersync: 0.2.3 -> 0.2.5 (switches from bincode 1.3.3 to
  bincode-next 2.1.0, which brings in bincode_derive-next 2.1.0 and
  the unty-next/virtue-next support crates)
- franken-decision: 0.2.0 -> 0.2.5
- franken-evidence: 0.2.0 -> 0.2.5
- franken-kernel: 0.2.0 -> 0.2.5
- ftui: 0.2.0 -> 0.2.1
- parking_lot now resolved as a regular dependency of fsqlite-harness
  (moved from dev-dependencies in the preceding harness commit)

No source changes — this is purely the lockfile tracking the dependency
graph updates from workspace members and their transitive deps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
